caption: The video captures a conference or seminar held on April 14, 2018, in Nashville, TN, focusing on the topic "Trump’s Economy: Boom Times or Dangerous Bubble?" The scene is set in a well-lit room with a large audience seated at round tables, attentively listening to a speaker standing at a podium. The speaker, dressed in a suit, appears to be delivering a presentation, possibly using a laptop and a projector screen that is currently blank. Another individual stands to the left of the speaker, perhaps assisting or preparing for their turn. The attendees are engaged, some taking notes, while others are simply observing. The atmosphere suggests a serious discussion on economic matters, likely involving analysis and debate on the state of the economy under President Trump's administration.
